visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a fuzzy grey cardigan, leans over a refrigerated meat display case. She is looking intently at the items inside. The setting is a large, brightly lit warehouse-style store with high ceilings and metallic shelves. (2) Close-up shot of raw beef packages in vacuum-sealed trays. One tray has a prominent black label, and others have white labels. The camera zooms in on a price tag indicating a discount. (3) The woman's hand enters the frame, pointing first at a package with a black label and then at one with a white label. Other shoppers and shopping carts are visible but blurred in the background. The lighting is bright and even studio-like warehouse lighting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: oh. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 牛. [Slogan]: 隱藏款！討論度爆高 牛腱心. (2) [Subtitle]: 他現在在特價. [Subtitle]: 特選牛腱心 真空包. [Slogan]: $379/KG. [Variety]: 469 折了 90. (3) [Subtitle]: 我跟你們說有什麼差別哦. [Subtitle]: 他有黑色跟白色包裝嘛. [Subtitle]: 黑色的是後腿牛腱心. [Subtitle]: 白色的話就是一般的牛腱心. [Variety]: 更強而有力 的後腿. [Subtitle]: 但是它們價格都一模一樣.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, at least 2 other female shoppers visible in background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair, wearing a fuzzy light grey cardigan over a dark top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco interior with large refrigerated cases, metal shelving units, and concrete floors.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice with high enthusiasm starts by exclaiming 'Oh!' followed by a rapid, high-pitched pitch contour. A high-tempo electronic BGM with synth textures and a clear 4/4 beat starts immediately. (2) A sharp 'Pop' sound effect triggers as text graphics appear on screen. The narrator's speech rate remains steady and energetic, describing pricing with a rising intonation. (3) Several 'Ding' sound effects are used to punctuate points of comparison between two items. The narrator's tone is friendly and helpful. The BGM remains continuous and maintains a bright spectral profile throughout the segment.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is designed to inform viewers about a specific discount on beef heel muscle at Costco, using a combination of enthusiastic narration and visual on-screen text to highlight value and product differences.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While featuring Costco products, it appears to be a user-generated shopping tip rather than a paid advertisement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media editing styles with heavy text overlays and SFX to maintain engagement during a simple product showcase.
